articles.author: Brenda Goodman and Francesca Giuliani Hoffman, CNN
articles.title: American passenger on hantavirus-hit cruise feels 'blindsided,' 'misled' by new quarantine orders - KSL.com
articles.description: An American passenger who was exposed to the Andes strain of hantavirus on the cruise ship HV Hondius said he feels "blindsided" and "misled" by new orders requiring him to stay at the National Quarantine Center in Nebraska under federal supervision.

articles.author: Catherine Belton, Rudy Lu
articles.title: As Putin visits China, distrust simmers beneath an anti-U.S. alliance - The Washington Post
articles.description: Back-to-back visits to Beijing by the American and Russian presidents are highlighting how China's Xi Jinping is the world leader to be reckoned with and courted.
articles.content: In the hours before Russian President Vladimir Putin arrived in China on Tuesday, he beamed out a video message proclaiming an unprecedented level of relations between Moscow and Beijing and cooperat… [+21 chars]
